results.title: GMP Inspection Fundamentals
results.description: An introductory course covering the principles and practices of Good Manufacturing Practice inspections for pharmaceutical manufacturing facilities.

results.title: Pharmacovigilance Signal Detection
results.description: Advanced workshop on identifying, assessing, and managing safety signals from pharmacovigilance databases and adverse event reporting systems.

results.title: Bioequivalence Study Design
results.description: Comprehensive training on designing, conducting, and evaluating bioequivalence studies for generic medicine registration applications.

results.title: Regulatory Leadership Masterclass
results.description: A high-level leadership program designed for senior regulatory officials focusing on strategic planning, stakeholder engagement, and institutional governance.

results.title: Laboratory Quality Management Systems
results.description: Training on establishing and maintaining quality management systems in pharmaceutical testing laboratories in compliance with ISO 17025 standards.

results.title: Risk-Based Inspection Planning
results.description: Webinar series on implementing risk-based approaches to pharmaceutical inspection planning and resource allocation.

results.title: Adverse Drug Reaction Reporting
results.description: Foundational training on collecting, documenting, and reporting adverse drug reactions following international standards.

results.title: Regulatory Dossier Assessment
results.description: Intensive course on evaluating pharmaceutical product registration dossiers including chemistry, manufacturing and controls (CMC) sections.
